diagrams.title: MVCC Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows how MVCC components interact: version storage, transaction table, and garbage collector working together
elements: Version Chain for each data item
diagrams.purpose: Understand the overall MVCC system architecture and component relationships

diagrams.title: Version Chain Structure
diagrams.description: Linked list structure showing multiple versions of a data item with their metadata
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how historical versions are maintained and traversed for visibility checking

diagrams.title: Snapshot Isolation Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline diagram showing concurrent transactions and their visible data windows
elements: Transaction T1: Start at T=10, Commit at T=20
Transaction T2: Start at T=15, Commit at T=25
Transaction T3: Start at T=18, Running
diagrams.purpose: Understand how different transactions see different snapshots based on their start times

diagrams.title: Timestamp Ordering Rules
diagrams.description: Visual representation of read and write rules in timestamp ordering algorithm
diagrams.purpose: Remember the conditions for allowing read and write operations in T/O
